Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/294.text: Abhājanaṁ ayanti ovādassa adāneneva (I), atthā janayanti ovādassa adāneneva (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/306.text: Saṁ 2. 304; Aṁ 2. 274; Aṁ 3. 114; 191; Khu 8. 265 piṭṭhesu aññathā āgataṁ.
Bhaṅge uddhumātapakkamhi bhijjanato ca (Sī), bhaṅgehi uddhumātapakkabhijjanato ca (I)
Dosarahito natthi kiñcananti so ahaṁ evaṁ pahīnataṇho āsārahito yathā puṇṇamāsiyaṁ paripuṇṇakālo cando (Sī, I)

variants.reading: Dosarahito natthi kiñcananti so ahaṁ evaṁ pahīnataṇho āsārahito yathā puṇṇamāsiyaṁ paripuṇṇakālo cando

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/310.text: Kaṁ nu tattha na ramenti (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/324.text: ...tama (Ka) 3-3. Yena taṁ abbūḷhaṁ anuddhaṭaṁ aghagataṁ vijitaṁ akatvā (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/324.text: Sutagandhaṁ cāgagandhaṁ (Sī, I, Ka), sutagandhañca vācāgandhañca (Dhammapada-Ṭṭha 1. 242 piṭṭhe.)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/349.text: Parisuddhakāyasamācāratāya payato, parisuddhavacīsamācāratāya suci, suparisuddhamanosamācāratāya suddho (Sī, I, Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/359.text: Pasahanti sarabhasasaṁghasāhasavasena pasahanto (Sī), pasahanti sarabhasaṁ sāhasavasena pasahanto (I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/374.text: Na kampenti na kiñci cālenti (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/380.text: Na tāvāhaṁ paṇipatiṁ paṇipātaṁ nākāsiṁ (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/416.text: Appuyya pāpuṇeyyāsi, pāpuṇanto pana (I), abbuyya pāpuṇeyyāsi, pāpuṇanto pana (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/428.text: Atimānahato bāloti tato (Sī), atimānahato bāloti hataṁ tato (I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/434.text: Etadabravi, yaṁ pana abravi, taṁ pana (Sī, I)
Sādhunā sādhu (Sī, I) 4. Ājaññakārinā damito (Sī, I) 5. Ghaṭe dīpasadisaṁ (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/446.text: Kujjhanena pana kuddhassa (Sī), kujjhante pana kuddhassa (I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/509.text: Nibbinditaṁ lokiyasaddhādito uddharitvā lokuttarasaddhādike patiṭṭhapetvā (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/536.text: Tasmiṁ devanikāye nibbattehi Tusitagaṇehi (Sī), yasmiṁ devanikāye nibbattā, tehi Tusitaguṇehi (I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/586.text: Paṭisallānakāraṇāti paṭisallānāti cittaṁ nānārammaṇā nivattetvā kammaṭṭhāneyeva cittassa paṭi (Sī, I)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/619.text: Manussasampatti devasampatti brahmasampatti nibbānasampattīti (Sī, I), manussasampattiṁ dibbasampattiṁ nibbānasampattinti (Ka)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/948.text: Attho na tena atthena diṭṭhadhammikādibhedahitanimittaṁ dhammaṁ na desenti (Sī)

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/1217.text: Pubbavidehānanti pubbavidehānaṁ ca dīpaṁ. (Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 320 piṭṭhe.) Pupphavidehānanti pubbavidehaṭṭhānaṁ dīpaṁ, pubbavidehanti attho. (?)
Dutiyagāthāto yāva catutthagāthā, tāva gāthānaṁ Pāḷiyā visamatā dissati, atthuppattiyā pana saṁsandatiyeva.

Theragāthāaṭṭhakathā/X/X/1288.text: Attho, keci devā diṭṭhigatikā, na ca sattāvāsabhāvaladdhiṁ (Ka)
